an6.73:1.1: “Monks, without abandoning six things, one is incapable of entering & remaining in the first jhāna.
an6.73:1.3: Sensual desire, ill will, sloth & drowsiness, restlessness & anxiety, uncertainty,
an6.73:1.4: and one has not seen well, with right discernment—as they have come to be—the drawbacks of sensuality.
an6.73:1.5: Without abandoning these six things, one is incapable of entering & remaining in the first jhāna.”
